overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime exploration of a futuristic Asian-inspired elevated market street. The player walks through neon-lit corridors adorned with red paper lanterns, passing food stalls and overlooking lower levels with holographic advertisements in a hazy cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated cyberpunk walkway overlooking lower commercial district

events.description: camera turns left to follow the elevated walkway path

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated walkway overlooking neon-lit lower level with safety railing on the right

entered.detail: black metal railing running along the right side of the elevated walkway
glowing neon advertisements and signs visible on the level below
black and yellow caution tape strung along the upper level edge
large red industrial electrical box with warning labels
tall modern building with illuminated windows and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated cyberpunk walkway at night, with the camera moving forward along a metal safety railing. Below, neon signs illuminate the lower commercial district through a hazy atmosphere. The camera turns left around a large red electrical transformer, revealing towering glass buildings adorned with vertical neon billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with outdoor food stall umbrella

events.description: large red electrical transformer temporarily blocks the view while turning
camera slows and looks down over railing at lower level advertisements

agents.ego_description: slowing to look down at lower level while passing two NPCs standing under a large umbrella

notable_agents.action: two NPCs standing under large wooden umbrella looking out at the city view

entered.detail: traditional-style wooden market umbrella sheltering a food stall
large vertical screen displaying advertisements on the lower level

segments.scene_description: The camera passes a large red electrical box and approaches two NPCs standing under a traditional wooden umbrella at a food stall. The player slows down, looking down over the railing at digital billboards and neon signs on the lower level. The hazy cyberpunk cityscape stretches into the distance with glowing circular signs visible through the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market corridor with hanging red paper lanterns

events.description: entering covered walkway with dense red paper lanterns overhead
passing under dense cluster of red lanterns creating warm red glow

agents.ego_description: walking through covered market street lined with red paper lanterns and cyan neon floor lights

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the distance through the lantern corridor

entered.detail: numerous traditional red paper lanterns with black Japanese characters hanging overhead
dark wooden beams and roofing covering the walkway
glowing cyan light strips embedded in the floor along the walkway edges
wooden food service counter with equipment and supplies
futuristic vending machine with illuminated display showing 'IT'S BIG'

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered market corridor densely decorated with hanging red paper lanterns glowing against the dark wooden roof structure. Cyan neon lights line the floor, creating a classic cyberpunk color contrast. The camera passes wooden food stalls and a futuristic vending machine while following a distant pedestrian through the lantern-lit passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air market overlook with food stalls and lower level view

events.description: exiting covered corridor into open overlook area with view of lower levels
approaching railing and looking down at reflective water surface below

agents.ego_description: walking past food stalls and approaching overlook with view of lower level platforms and reflective surfaces

notable_agents.action: NPC standing near railing looking out at the lower level view

entered.detail: small potted tree in a square planter with underlighting
calm water below reflecting the neon lights and structures above
lower level market structures with green and yellow roofs visible across the water
large vertical screen displaying 'BE YOUR BEST SELF' with muscular figure

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered lantern corridor, the player enters an open-air overlook with potted trees and metal railings. The camera approaches the edge, revealing a stunning view of lower level market stalls reflected in a calm water surface below. Neon signs and digital advertisements illuminate the hazy depths of the cyberpunk city as the player explores the elevated walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along an elevated cyberpunk walkway that transitions from an open industrial vista into a dense, lantern-lit market corridor before ending at a scenic overlook. It begins by moving along a metal railing past a large red electrical transformer, where the camera reveals towering glass buildings and a hazy lower district illuminated by vertical neon billboards. As the camera passes NPCs under a wooden umbrella at a food stall, the view shifts back toward the glowing circular signs of the distant, misty cityscape. The scene then narrows as the player enters a covered corridor where hanging red paper lanterns and cyan floor lights create a sharp color contrast among wooden stalls and futuristic vending machines. Finally, the path opens up into an outdoor terrace with potted trees, where the camera reaches the railing to reveal lower-level market stalls reflected in a calm water surface deep within the neon-lit city.
